title: FAO Extension
description: FAO platform-specific fields for STAC Items and Collections published by the FAO Agro-Informatics Platform. Covers raster and vector products under one namespace.

fields.$comment: All fao:* fields are optional at the schema level.

fao:workspace.description: FAO workspace identifier (e.g. "ASIS", "WAPOR-3"). Service-agnostic; never embeds an internal-service term or storage-bucket path.

fao:product_id.description: FAO product identifier within the workspace. Typically equal to the STAC Collection id. Carried explicitly so consumers don't have to assume the equality.

fao:item_code.description: Per-item leaf code. Typically equal to the STAC Item id. Carried explicitly for the same reason as fao:product_id.

fao:layer_id.description: Stable, service-agnostic FAO layer reference for the Collection. Used to track provenance back to the FAO platform's internal layer registry without exposing the registry's URL or service identity.

fao:product_type.description: RASTER ONLY. FAO product-type classifier. mapset = single-tile collection of related rasters; mosaic = multi-tile composite; mosaicset = multi-tile composite organised by tile; dataset = miscellaneous. Vector collections MUST NOT set this field.

fao:geometry_type.description: VECTOR ONLY. OGR/GeoJSON geometry type (e.g. "Point", "LineString", "Polygon", "MultiPolygon"). Raster collections MUST NOT set this field.

fao:feature_count.description: VECTOR ONLY. Number of features in the layer (Collection level) or in the item (Item level). Raster collections MUST NOT set this field.

^(?!fao:).$comment: Allow any non-fao:-prefixed key to pass through (this extension co-exists with others).
